variants: Rakel Steinthorsdottir is an accomplished Dance Therapy specialist who holds a professional license known as the Phoenix Handler Credential. She is an active member of the Featherleaf Horticulture Circle, where she combines her passions for gardening and mental wellness. Rakel's research in dance therapy was guided by her mentor, Niklas Forsling, who provided invaluable insights during her training. Her work in the field has been supported by the Horizon Climber Consortium, which provided essential funding for her projects. Through these endeavors, she aims to promote healing through movement and nature.
